resources.title: 날씨 API MCP 서버 구축
resources.description: OpenWeatherMap API를 감싸는 MCP 서버를 TypeScript로 만들고 Claude Desktop에 연결하는 실습
resources.command: npm create mcp-server weather-mcp && cd weather-mcp && npm install @modelcontextprotocol/sdk

resources.title: 로컬 파일시스템 MCP 서버 연결
resources.description: 공식 filesystem MCP 서버를 Claude Desktop에 연결해서 Claude가 내 파일을 읽고 쓰는 경험 실습

quiz.question: What is the primary purpose of the Model Context Protocol (MCP)?
options: To facilitate communication between different software applications
To store large amounts of data in a cloud environment
To create graphical user interfaces for applications
To enhance the performance of local servers
quiz.explanation: The MCP is designed to facilitate communication between different software applications, enabling them to share context and data effectively.

quiz.question: Which programming language is primarily used for developing MCP servers and clients according to the official SDK?
quiz.explanation: The official SDK for developing MCP servers and clients is based on TypeScript, which is specifically mentioned in the learning content.

quiz.question: What is one of the practical implementations of MCP mentioned in the course content?
options: Connecting an MCP server to the OpenWeatherMap API
quiz.explanation: One of the practical implementations mentioned is wrapping the OpenWeatherMap API with an MCP server using TypeScript.

practicePrompts.label: Create MCP Server
practicePrompts.instruction: Build a simple MCP server using TypeScript.
practicePrompts.prompt: Create a basic MCP server in TypeScript that can handle simple messages.
practicePrompts.followUp: Add a feature to log incoming messages to the console.

practicePrompts.label: Connect to OpenWeatherMap
practicePrompts.instruction: Wrap the OpenWeatherMap API in an MCP server.
practicePrompts.prompt: Develop an MCP server in TypeScript that connects to the OpenWeatherMap API and retrieves weather data.
practicePrompts.followUp: Modify the server to respond with weather data based on user input.

practicePrompts.label: File System Integration
practicePrompts.instruction: Connect the official filesystem MCP server to Claude Desktop.
practicePrompts.prompt: Set up the official filesystem MCP server and connect it to Claude Desktop to read and write files.
practicePrompts.followUp: Experiment with adding a command to list all files in a specific directory.
